disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: First Canadian hantavirus case confirmed in B.C. patient - Global News
updates.body_en: First Canadian hantavirus case confirmed in B.C. patient Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省确诊首例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Lab tests confirm first case of hantavirus in Canada - CityNews Edmonton
updates.body_en: Lab tests confirm first case of hantavirus in Canada CityNews Edmonton
updates.summary_zh: 实验室确认加拿大首例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus death in Colorado, not linked to cruise ship outbreak - fox5sandiego.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus death in Colorado, not linked to cruise ship outbreak fox5sandiego.com
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州汉坦病毒死亡病例，与邮轮疫情无关。

updates.title_en: National lab confirms hantavirus case for Canadian cruise passenger isolating in B.C. - CBC
updates.body_en: National lab confirms hantavirus case for Canadian cruise passenger isolating in B.C. CBC
updates.summary_zh: 国家实验室确认加拿大邮轮乘客汉坦病毒病例，在BC省隔离。

updates.title_en: Canadian cruise passenger gets a presumptive positive hantavirus test result after ship outbreak - CNN
updates.body_en: Canadian cruise passenger gets a presumptive positive hantavirus test result after ship outbreak CNN
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大邮轮乘客汉坦病毒检测初筛阳性，邮轮爆发疫情。

updates.title_en: Media update on Andes hantavirus situation - The Globe and Mail
updates.body_en: Media update on Andes hantavirus situation The Globe and Mail
updates.summary_zh: 《环球邮报》发布关于安第斯汉坦病毒情况的媒体更新。

updates.title_en: Demand for cruises appears undimmed despite hantavirus and other onboard outbreaks - CTV News
updates.body_en: Demand for cruises appears undimmed despite hantavirus and other onboard outbreaks CTV News
updates.summary_zh: 尽管汉坦病毒等船上爆发，邮轮需求似乎未减。

updates.title_en: Where is hantavirus in US? North vs South America — researchers identify three emerging 'hotspots' - Mint
updates.body_en: Where is hantavirus in US? North vs South America — researchers identify three emerging 'hotspots' Mint
updates.summary_zh: 研究人员确定美国汉坦病毒三个新兴热点地区。

updates.title_en: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive - BBC
updates.body_en: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive BBC
updates.summary_zh: 一名来自汉坦病毒感染邮轮的加拿大人检测呈阳性。

updates.title_en: Canadians monitored following Andes hantavirus exposure linked to cruise ship outbreak - SwiftCurrentOnline
updates.body_en: Canadians monitored following Andes hantavirus exposure linked to cruise ship outbreak SwiftCurrentOnline
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大游客因邮轮疫情接触汉坦病毒，正接受监测。

updates.title_en: Canadian tourist on rat-virus cruise tests positive for Hantavirus - lbc.co.uk
updates.body_en: Canadian tourist on rat-virus cruise tests positive for Hantavirus lbc.co.uk
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大游客在邮轮上感染汉坦病毒，检测阳性。

updates.title_en: Canada confirms first hantavirus case in tourist on Vancouver Island - The Independent
updates.body_en: Canada confirms first hantavirus case in tourist on Vancouver Island The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大确认首例汉坦病毒病例，患者为温哥华岛游客。

updates.title_en: Presumptive Hantavirus Case Reported Among Canadians Returning From Cruise - VOCM
updates.body_en: Presumptive Hantavirus Case Reported Among Canadians Returning From Cruise VOCM
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大游客从邮轮返回后报告疑似汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Canadian tourist tests positive ​for hantavirus after leaving luxury cruise ship ‌hit by outbreak - The Independent
updates.body_en: Canadian tourist tests positive ​for hantavirus after leaving luxury cruise ship ‌hit by outbreak The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大游客离开爆发疫情的豪华邮轮后确诊汉坦病毒。
